The Royal Victoria Difference

Crafted for those who
refuse to compromise

As an exclusive importer, we work directly with the world's finest stone producers to bring surfaces of genuine rarity to the Australian market — backed by the fabrication expertise of Banks Benchtops.

See the Difference

Precision and Pride
in Every Surface

Family Owned, Australian Imported
From slab selection at the source to final installation, every Royal Victoria Collection surface reflects the uncompromising values of a family-owned business committed to excellence. Banks Benchtops has served Queensland's premium residential and commercial market for over two decades. Learn about our story
Visionary Design
Trends come and go — true elegance endures. Our collection spans marble-look calacattas, dramatic onyxes, rich earthtones, and subtle neutrals. Every design is curated by our team with an obsessive eye for movement, consistency, and beauty that holds up over decades.
Performance Perfected
Non-porous, scratch-resistant, and stain-resistant — our engineered stone surfaces require no sealing and virtually no maintenance. Backed by a comprehensive warranty, Royal Victoria Collection stone is as practical as it is beautiful.
Superior Trade Support
We invest in our trade partners. Authorised retailers and fabricators receive dedicated account management, technical specifications, priority sample ordering, and access to our full slab library. Design and build with confidence. Partner with RVC

Why Calacatta Viola Is the Interior Designer's New Obsession

The warm whites and violet veining of Calacatta Viola have captivated top Queensland designers — and it's easy to see why. We explore the design language of this extraordinary stone.

Design Trends

The Rise of Gemstone Surfaces in Luxury Australian Interiors

Onyx, amethyst, and semi-precious stone surfaces are having a moment at the premium end of the Australian market. Here's what's driving demand — and how to specify it.
